label: Single chemistry CONFIRMED
notes: Single-domain baseline; weight=1.0

label: physics_dimensional + chemistry both CONFIRMED
notes: Two physical-science domains confirmed

label: statistics_pvalue + mathematics both CONFIRMED
notes: Two reasoning-axis domains confirmed

label: labor + economics + finance triple CONCORDANT
notes: All three authority/conservation domains confirmed

label: Five-domain CONCORDANT (chem + phys + stats + math + labor)
notes: Widest CONCORDANT — five diverse domains

label: Single chemistry MISMATCH
notes: Single-domain baseline for DISCORDANT; weight=1.0

label: physics_dimensional MISMATCH + chemistry CONFIRMED
notes: Core-domain (physics) mismatch; mismatch_frac well above 0.25

label: Both chemistry and physics_dimensional MISMATCH
notes: Two physical-science mismatches

label: mathematics MISMATCH (derivative) in physics + statistics context
notes: math axes={reasoning}, phys={conservation_balance,physical_substance,reasoning}, stats={reasoning}. situation_dims={conservation_balance,physical_substance,reasoning}. w(math)=1/3≈0.33; w_mismatch=0.33; mismatch_frac=0.33/(0.33+1.0+0.33)≈0.20 — JUST below 0.25 → actually MIXED. Wait: check actual axis dims at runtime.

label: finance MISMATCH in labor + economics context → DISCORDANT if weight high enough
notes: labor/economics/finance all share authority_trust+conservation_balance+time_sequence axes. finance has same axis coverage as the others, so mismatch_frac = ~0.33 ≥ 0.25 → DISCORDANT.

label: Peripheral music_theory MISMATCH in chem+phys+economics+labor context → MIXED
notes: situation_dims = all axes of 5 domains (≥6 axes). music_theory covers {encoding,physical_substance,reasoning} = ~3 axes. Each confirmed domain covers 3-4 axes. mismatch_frac = w(music_theory)/w_total < 0.25 → MIXED.

label: Peripheral statistics_pvalue MISMATCH in labor+economics+finance context → MIXED
notes: situation_dims includes authority_trust, conservation_balance, metabolism, time_sequence, reasoning (≥5). statistics_pvalue only covers {reasoning} = weight 1/5 = 0.2. mismatch_frac = 0.2 / (0.8+0.8+0.8+0.2) = 0.077 < 0.25 → MIXED.

label: Quarantined claims only → QUARANTINE
quarantined_claims: The contractual obligation was met by the counterparty.
The subjective assessment was deemed reasonable.
notes: No domain results; only quarantined claims → QUARANTINE

label: Confirmed domains + quarantined claims → QUARANTINE
quarantined_claims: The contract terms are fair and reasonable.
notes: Confirmed domains but quarantined claims present. Per compute_weighted_composite_verdict: w_confirmed > 0 AND has_quarantined → QUARANTINE (the airlocked claims prevent full CONCORDANT).

label: Empty domain list → OUT_OF_SCOPE
notes: No domains, no quarantined claims → OUT_OF_SCOPE

label: chemistry + physics_dimensional share physical_substance axis
notes: Verifies compute_axis_overlaps: chemistry={cons,metab,phys_sub}, phys_dim={phys_sub,reasoning} → only physical_substance shared

label: statistics_pvalue + mathematics share reasoning axis
notes: Both reasoning-only domains → one shared axis

label: Single-domain: weight=1.0 → weighted same as unweighted (CONCORDANT)
notes: Single domain: axis_weight=1.0; both paths agree

label: Single-domain: weight=1.0 → weighted same as unweighted (DISCORDANT)
notes: Single-domain mismatch; weight=1.0 so mismatch_frac=1.0 → DISCORDANT

label: chemistry MISMATCH (weight=0.5) in statistics+labor context → mismatch_frac=0.375
notes: chemistry: {conservation_balance,metabolism,physical_substance} = 3 axes. statistics_pvalue: {reasoning} = 1 axis. labor: {authority_trust,conservation_balance,metabolism,time_sequence} = 4 axes. situation_dims=6. w(chem)=3/6=0.5; w(stat)=1/6=0.167; w(lab)=4/6=0.667. mismatch_frac=0.5/1.334=0.375 ≥ 0.25 → DISCORDANT.
